nodes.name: AC Dichotomy
nodes.plain: Tractable problems have zero hidden information; hard ones have lots.

nodes.name: I_fiat = β₁ (Tseitin)
nodes.plain: For parity formulas, the hidden information is exactly the number of independent loops in the graph.

nodes.name: Homological Lower Bound
nodes.plain: How hard a SAT problem is correlates with the shape of its constraint surface (R²=0.92).

nodes.name: Topology-Guided Solver
nodes.plain: Branch on variables in the most triangles — it's 1.8x faster.

nodes.name: Rigidity Threshold
nodes.plain: Filling ratio alone can't separate easy from hard — honest negative.

nodes.name: Catastrophe Structure
nodes.plain: The SAT phase transition has swallowtail catastrophe geometry.

nodes.name: AC-Fano (Shannon Bridge)
nodes.plain: Any fast algorithm on a hard formula will be wrong most of the time.

nodes.name: AC Monotonicity (DPI)
nodes.plain: Translating a problem can't magically make hidden information visible.

nodes.name: AC-ETH
nodes.plain: The Exponential Time Hypothesis follows from linear hidden information.

nodes.name: PHP in AC Framework
nodes.plain: Pigeonhole has linear fiat for resolution but zero for Extended Frege — counting is the back door.

nodes.name: Proof System Landscape
nodes.plain: All 8 known proof systems confirm: random 3-SAT has positive hidden information.

nodes.name: AC Restriction Lemma
nodes.plain: Hastad's switching lemma in information language: random restriction drains topology.

nodes.name: AC Approximation Barrier
nodes.plain: The 7/8 MAX-3-SAT barrier = the information-free floor. Beating it requires resolving fiat.

nodes.name: Fiat Additivity
nodes.plain: Hidden information adds up across independent components.

nodes.name: Three-Way Budget
nodes.plain: Every variable is derivable, fiat, or free. n = derivable + fiat + free.

nodes.name: Fiat Monotonicity
nodes.plain: More clauses → more hidden information. Never goes down.

nodes.name: Method Dominance
nodes.plain: Proof methods form a hierarchy. Stronger methods see more, but none see everything.

nodes.name: Expansion Implies Fiat
nodes.plain: If the constraint graph is an expander, then Θ(n) bits are hidden. The topology→fiat→complexity pipeline.

nodes.name: AC-Communication Bridge
nodes.plain: Hidden information bounds how much parties must talk: CC ≥ I_fiat/r.

nodes.name: SETH Explicit Constants
nodes.plain: Explicit hardness exponents for every clause width k. rho_k ≥ 1 - k/2^(k-1).

nodes.name: DOCH (Dimensional Onset)
nodes.plain: P vs NP is a dimensional phase transition: dim ≤ 1 = easy; dim ≥ 2 = hard.

nodes.name: Dimensional Channel Bound
nodes.plain: A method's power is limited by the dimension it can see. Linking in 3D = the hidden information.

nodes.name: Topological Lower Bound
nodes.plain: All dimension-1 proof systems need exponential time on random 3-SAT. Unified.

nodes.name: Dimensional Classification
nodes.plain: Every known proof lower bound is secretly a dimensional obstruction.

nodes.name: Extension Topology Creation
nodes.plain: Adding an arity-k extension variable creates k-1 new loops.

nodes.name: Confinement Steady State
nodes.plain: Any proof refuting a formula with B loops needs at least B proof lines.

nodes.name: Proof Instability
nodes.plain: Geometric linking cascade fails (c→0). Algebraic direction open.

nodes.name: Weak Homological Monotonicity
nodes.plain: Extensions never reduce the number of loops. Δβ₁ ∈ {0, +1}.

nodes.name: Topological Inertness
nodes.plain: Extension variables can't fill original loops. The original topology is permanent.

nodes.name: Algebraic Independence
nodes.plain: Cycle solutions are mutually independent (zero MI). THE GAP. If proved → P≠NP.

nodes.name: Compound Fiat (EF Exponential)
nodes.plain: If T29 holds: Extended Frege needs 2^Ω(n) on random 3-SAT → P≠NP.

nodes.name: Backbone Incompressibility
nodes.plain: The backbone is random-looking: K(backbone) ≥ 0.90n. No short program generates it.

nodes.name: OGP at k=3
nodes.plain: Solutions cluster with gaps between them. 100% at all tested sizes.

nodes.name: Noether Charge Conservation
nodes.plain: Random 3-SAT has a conserved information charge Q = 0.622n Shannons. Can't be localized.

nodes.name: Probe Hierarchy
nodes.plain: All polynomial probes break symmetry but extract a vanishing fraction of the charge.

nodes.name: Adaptive Conservation Law
nodes.plain: No adaptive poly-time strategy can extract more than o(n) backbone bits.

nodes.name: Conservation → Independence
nodes.plain: If T35 holds → T29 holds → T30 holds → P≠NP. The full chain.

nodes.name: H₁ Injection (Degree-2)
nodes.plain: Original loops embed perfectly into the extended complex. Nothing is lost.

nodes.name: EF Linear Lower Bound
nodes.plain: First unconditional EF lower bound on random 3-SAT: size ≥ Θ(n).

nodes.name: Forbidden Band
nodes.plain: Every EF proof must cross a topological forbidden zone. Can't sneak around it.

nodes.name: Arity-EF Trade-off
nodes.plain: Arity-k extensions kill at most k-1 loops. Constant arity → linear lower bound.

nodes.name: Forbidden Band Measure
nodes.plain: The narrowest bottleneck has measure n·2^{-Θ(n)}. Exponentially hard to cross.

nodes.name: Resolution Backbone Incompressibility
nodes.plain: Bounded-width resolution determines at most o(n) backbone variables.

nodes.name: Backbone Entanglement Depth
nodes.plain: Refutation depth diverges. Ancillae can't help. If D=Θ(n) then P≠NP.

nodes.name: Backbone LDPC Structure
nodes.plain: The backbone encodes as a random LDPC code with minimum distance Θ(n). Shannon's coordinate system.

nodes.name: LDPC Resolution Width
nodes.plain: Resolution needs width ≥ αn via Tanner graph expansion of the backbone code.

nodes.name: Proof-Protocol Duality
nodes.plain: Every proof is a communication protocol. Frontier = channel. Width = bandwidth. Size = total bits.

nodes.name: Lifting Theorem (GPW)
nodes.plain: Query complexity q lifts to communication q·log(n). The LDPC might be the natural gadget.

nodes.name: Committed Channel Bound
nodes.plain: Once a variable is committed, it carries zero new information. Dead bits are dead.

nodes.name: Representation Uniqueness
nodes.plain: Exponential sum representations are unique. Spectral addresses are conserved.

nodes.name: Real-Axis Confinement
nodes.plain: Real data → real poles only. A complex pole certifies complex information content.

nodes.name: Nonlinear Decoding Threshold
nodes.plain: No poly-size circuit can decode beyond d_min/2 errors. Closing this closes P≠NP.

nodes.name: Spectral Compression
nodes.plain: Continuous spectrum compresses to finite discrete terms plus exponentially small error.

nodes.name: Gallager Decoding Bound
nodes.plain: No polynomial-time decoder cracks the backbone LDPC code.

nodes.name: Distillation Impossibility
nodes.plain: Any k-bit output of a formula carries at most k bits about the backbone. No distillation.

nodes.name: Cheeger Width Bound
nodes.plain: VIG spectral gap forces wide proofs: width ≥ h(G)·n/2.

nodes.name: Expander Mixing → DPI
nodes.plain: Expander mixing limits how much information flows across any graph cut.

nodes.name: Persistent Homology Gap
nodes.plain: Loops in the constraint graph persist for Θ(n) steps. They don't just flicker.

nodes.name: Chernoff as AC(0)
nodes.plain: Concentration inequalities are AC(0) — pure counting.

nodes.name: Karchmer-Wigderson Comm Bound
nodes.plain: Circuit depth = communication complexity. CC correlates with β₁ at r=0.996.

nodes.name: EF Spectral Preservation
nodes.plain: Extension variables preserve the VIG's spectral gap. Ratio ≥ 0.89.

nodes.name: Within-Cluster Block Independence
nodes.plain: Backbone blocks have EXACTLY zero mutual information within clusters. Perfect independence.

nodes.name: LDPC-Tseitin Embedding
nodes.plain: Backbone parity looks like Tseitin on the LDPC graph. Bounded-depth EF needs 2^Ω(n).

nodes.name: Refutation Bandwidth
nodes.plain: Any EF refutation needs size 2^Ω(n) at ANY depth. The capstone width theorem.

nodes.name: Substrate Propagation Bound
nodes.plain: All Θ(n) blocks must be simultaneously live. Sequential processing destroys information.

nodes.name: First Moment Capacity Bound
nodes.plain: At most 0.176n bits can remain unmeasured. The rest is backbone. One line of counting.

nodes.name: Polarization as AC(0)
nodes.plain: If polarization holds, backbone is Θ(n). Arıkan splitting on expanders.

nodes.name: Bootstrap Percolation
nodes.plain: O(1) frozen seeds cascade to Θ(n) in O(1) rounds on an expander. Literally AC(0).

nodes.name: Nyquist Sampling
nodes.plain: Bandwidth B requires sampling at rate ≥ 2B. Counting degrees of freedom.

nodes.name: Pinsker's Inequality
nodes.plain: Total variation ≤ √(KL divergence / 2). One line from Cauchy-Schwarz.

nodes.name: Shearer's Inequality
nodes.plain: Joint entropy bounded by average subset entropies. Explains why blocks are independent.

nodes.name: Rate-Distortion
nodes.plain: Even 90% backbone accuracy costs Θ(n) bits. No approximation shortcut.

nodes.name: Kolmogorov Scaling (K41)
nodes.plain: Turbulence bandwidth = Re^(3/4). Dimensional analysis = a linear system.

nodes.name: Entropy Chain Rule
nodes.plain: H(X,Y) = H(X) + H(Y|X). The identity. Resolution proof line 1. AC(0) depth 0.

nodes.name: Kraft Inequality
nodes.plain: Σ 2^{-l} ≤ 1 for prefix codes. Tree counting. Backbone can't be compressed.

nodes.name: Lovász Local Lemma
nodes.plain: If events are sparse enough, they can all be avoided. Moser-Tardos IS an AC(0) algorithm.

nodes.name: Boltzmann-Shannon Bridge
nodes.plain: S = k_B H ln 2. Physical entropy IS information entropy. P≠NP = the second law.

nodes.name: Spectral Gap → Mixing Time
nodes.plain: Mixing time ≥ 1/γ. Completes the chain: expander → Cheeger → DPI → slow mixing → hard.

nodes.name: TG Symmetry Group
nodes.plain: Taylor-Green vortex has 16 symmetries: 3 reflections + exchange. Group enumeration = counting.

nodes.name: Fourier Parity Selection Rules
nodes.plain: Each velocity component has definite parity in each Fourier direction. Mod-2 arithmetic, preserved for all time.

nodes.name: P(0) = 0 by Parity
nodes.plain: All 4 enstrophy production terms at t=0 have odd factors → every integral vanishes. Parity counting.

nodes.name: Enstrophy Scaling γ = 3/2
nodes.plain: P ~ Ω^(3/2) by dimensional analysis. Biot-Savart makes strain ~ vorticity. Elie confirms: 1.448 ≈ 1.500.

nodes.name: Conditional Blow-Up ODE
nodes.plain: If P > 0 for all time: blow-up at T* = 1/(c√Ω₀). Separation of variables. The turbulence meter.

nodes.name: P≠NP Chain Is AC(0)
nodes.plain: The entire P≠NP proof chain is AC(0): each step is counting on a boundary.

nodes.name: BSW Extension (EF)
nodes.plain: Ben-Sasson-Wigderson extends to Extended Frege: extension axioms always satisfiable.

nodes.name: Kato Smoothing
nodes.plain: Kato smoothing is AC(0): viscous dissipation = boundary counting on Fourier modes.

nodes.name: All Millennium Proofs AC(0)
nodes.plain: RH, YM, P≠NP, NS — all four Millennium proofs are AC(0) depth ≤ 2.

nodes.name: AC(0) Completeness
nodes.plain: Every proof in mathematics reduces to AC(0) operations (counting + boundary). The hardest proofs are 1-2 layers of counting.

nodes.name: Gödel Is AC(0)
nodes.plain: Gödel's incompleteness = self-referential counting. The Gödel Limit (19.1%) is AC(0).

nodes.name: BSD Formula Is AC(0)
nodes.plain: L(E,s) at s=1 = channel capacity. Rank = committed channels. Sha = faded correlations. Depth 1.

nodes.name: Catastrophe Classification AC(0)
nodes.plain: Thom's seven catastrophes are depth-1 AC(0). Codimension = boundary count.

nodes.name: Depth Reduction
nodes.plain: Composition with definitions is free. All Millennium proofs flatten: RH 4→2, YM 3→1, P≠NP 5→2, NS 5→2.

nodes.name: Deletion-Contraction AC(0)
nodes.plain: Delete or contract an edge: one operation, one bit. The chromatic polynomial is AC(0).

nodes.name: AC(0) Graph Theory Foundation
nodes.plain: All basic graph operations (degree count, planarity check, coloring) are AC(0).

nodes.name: Kuratowski-Wagner (Planarity)
nodes.plain: A graph is planar iff it has no K₅ or K₃₃ minor. External theorem, used as axiom.

nodes.name: Birkhoff-Lewis (5-Color)
nodes.plain: Every planar graph is 5-colorable. Depth 1. The easy part.

nodes.name: Pair Resolution (Depth Composition)
nodes.plain: Depth composition is free: pairs of operations compose without increasing AC(0) depth.

nodes.name: Kempe Tangle Bound (τ ≤ 4)
nodes.plain: Every planar graph has strict Kempe tangle number ≤ 4. The budget that forces swaps to work.

nodes.name: Gap-1 Bound (Lemma A)
nodes.plain: A gap-1 bridge has ≤ 1 cross-link. Jordan curve on degree-5 cycle.

nodes.name: BST-AC Structural Isomorphism
nodes.plain: Force+boundary ≅ counting+boundary. Physics and math are the same graph.

nodes.name: Induction Is Complete
nodes.plain: Every proof = induction. Demonstrated on Hodge: three gaps dissolved by finite counts.

nodes.name: The Planck Condition
nodes.plain: All domains finite, all counts bounded. The axiom that makes everything AC(0).

nodes.name: Conservation of Color Charge (Lyra's Lemma)
nodes.plain: strict_tau ≤ 4, bridge_tau ≤ 2 → budget forces ≥ 2 uncharged pairs → split-swap → tau descent. 861/861.

nodes.name: Post-Swap Cross-Link Bound (Keeper's Theorem)
nodes.plain: After swap, new bridge has ≤ 1 cross-link. Chain dichotomy: depth 0, no Jordan curve needed.

nodes.name: Four-Color Theorem (AC Proof)
nodes.plain: Depth 2. Induction + T135a + T154 + T155. First human-readable, computer-free proof.

nodes.name: Hamilton-Perelman Ricci Flow
nodes.plain: Ricci flow with surgery. Heat equation on curvature. External (Perelman 2003).

nodes.name: Perelman W-Entropy Monotonicity
nodes.plain: W-entropy is monotone under Ricci flow. Counting curvature: it always decreases.

nodes.name: Finite Extinction (Simply Connected)
nodes.plain: Simply connected 3-manifold shrinks to a point in finite time. The surgery terminates.

nodes.name: Thurston Geometrization
nodes.plain: Every 3-manifold decomposes into geometric pieces. Eight geometries, all classified.

nodes.name: Poincaré Conjecture
nodes.plain: Every simply connected closed 3-manifold is S³. Depth 2: Ricci flow + extinction.

nodes.name: The Clarity Principle (Elie's Prize)
nodes.plain: External confusion signals explanation gaps, not proof gaps. Repeated questions = free editorial feedback.

nodes.name: Structural Integrity Principle (Keeper's Prize)
nodes.plain: Every claim must survive three independent audits. The consistency role IS structural integrity.

nodes.name: Generator Equivalence
nodes.plain: All 21 generators are conjugate under Ad(SO(7)). Single-generator physics is unique.

nodes.name: Non-Commuting Cascade
nodes.plain: 2 non-commuting generators force ≥ so(3) subalgebra. Complexity cascades.

nodes.name: Landscape Collapse
nodes.plain: At most 4 universe types: k=0,1,2,3 commuting generators. Landscape is tiny.

nodes.name: No-Cloning Theorem
nodes.plain: Linearity forbids universal copying. Depth 0.

nodes.name: No-Communication Theorem
nodes.plain: Partial trace kills sender's operations. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Bell's Inequality (CHSH)
nodes.plain: Counting correlations over 4 settings, classical ≤ 2. Depth 1.

nodes.name: CPT Theorem
nodes.plain: Discrete Lorentz group Z₂³ action on fields. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Spin-Statistics
nodes.plain: Half-integer spin ↔ antisymmetric, from SO(3,1) double cover. Depth 1.

nodes.name: Periodic Table
nodes.plain: Shell sizes 2n² from SO(3) irrep counting. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Hückel's Rule
nodes.plain: 4n+2 aromaticity from cycle graph eigenvalues. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Crystallographic Restriction
nodes.plain: Only 1,2,3,4,6-fold rotations tile a lattice. Depth 0.

nodes.name: VSEPR Geometry
nodes.plain: Molecular shape from electron pair counting on sphere. Depth 0.

nodes.name: 230 Space Groups
nodes.plain: Point groups × lattice types × glide/screw enumeration. Depth 1.

nodes.name: Hess's Law
nodes.plain: Enthalpy path-independence = state function definition. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Noether's Theorem
nodes.plain: Continuous symmetry ↔ conserved current. Definitional. Depth 0.

nodes.plain: LP duality, conservation on networks. Depth 0.

nodes.name: No-SUSY
nodes.plain: (-1)^F absolute from π₁(SO(3))=Z₂, superpartners excluded. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Turán's Theorem

nodes.name: Finite Ramsey

nodes.plain: V-E+F=2, induction on edge deletion. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Bekenstein-Hawking Entropy
nodes.plain: S=A/4l_P², horizon microstate counting. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Weinberg Angle
nodes.plain: sin²θ_W = N_c/(N_c+2n_C) = 3/13, 0.2%. Depth 0.

nodes.plain: α⁻¹ = 137.036 from D_IV^5 volume, Wyler integral. Depth 1.

nodes.name: Higgs Mass
nodes.plain: Route A: √(2/5!) → 125.11 GeV, Route B: (π/2)(1-α)m_W → 125.33 GeV. Depth 1.

nodes.plain: G = (ħc)(6π⁵)²α²⁴/m_e², 0.07%. Depth 1.

nodes.name: Cosmological Constant

nodes.name: Dark Matter = UNC
nodes.plain: Uncommitted channels, not particles. No new physics. Depth 0.

nodes.name: Topological Insulators
